message:
chore(beads): ft-xbnl0.2.4 tick 432 — mpsc mid-flight cancel finding

Attaches tick-432 bead comment documenting the newly-discovered
gap (asupersync mpsc::recv does not register cx-cancel-waker on
already-suspended recv) and pinning the caller-side select-race
workaround pattern (commit 9a868dd2). Local count 104/104.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
